name: font_size_block

meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.17 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-06-17] The block form ［＃ここからN段階大きな文字］ … ［＃ここで大きな文字終わり］ (corpus: ~3 openers, ~25 closers) shifts the enclosed paragraphs' size. The opener carries the signed magnitude; the closer carries only the direction (大きな vs 小さな), its magnitude a ±1 placeholder, and pairs by the font-size family (§7.1). Renders <div class="aozora-container aozora-container-font-larger" data-steps="N">. Offsets computed from the §3 byte model; cross-checked against the reference processor. New family.

source:
［＃ここから2段階大きな文字］
大文字
［＃ここで大きな文字終わり］

expected.serialize:
［＃ここから2段階大きな文字］

大文字

［＃ここで大きな文字終わり］
